spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — @container scroll-state(scrolled: ...) — style descendants based on last scroll direction (top/left/right/bottom)…

interactive.rationale: 3 buttons / 0 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on header, pure, scroll, scrolled).

edge_cases.rationale: Demo runs the happy path; no visible feature detection, error handling, or no-support fallback in the script.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/5083137520173056.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

summary: scrolled-state-style under scroll-state-scrolled-support: 4 pass / 1 partial / 1 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story complete. ChromeStatus reference link resolved.
